creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, I have a working ports (ready to commit) of firebird30-[client|server] and I'm trying port firebird40 too but it could take more time to commit it

It needs some bit changes into firebird.mk. Could you approve this changes?

https://people.freebsd.org/~acm/ports/firebird.mk.diff

Greetings
